'''Rilctur''' was a [[General/Legends|General]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. The [[Rilctur carbine]] was named after him.

==Behind the scenes==
Rilctur is mentioned in the description of the Rilctur carbine, a weapon found in the [[ShadowWeave caverns]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1stm}}
